name: Search · GitHub
snippet: GitHub is where people build software. More than 150 million people use GitHub to discover, fork, and contribute to over 420 million projects.

name: CEFR Practice Test 2026 May — Practice Questions
snippet: Start with our free CEFR practice test to identify your strengths and areas for improvement. You will receive instant results, a detailed level breakdown, and expert explanations for every answer — all at no cost.

name: TestCafe - checkops.com
snippet: TestCafe is built on Node.js and utilizes JavaScript for scripting tests. This makes it accessible for web developers familiar with the language, enabling them to write tests in a way that is consistent with their development practices.

name: CEFR English Test - Find your CEFR level
UniversalCEFR (UniversalCEFR) - Hugging Face
snippet: A community initiative towards open multilingual language proficiency assessment, particularly using the CEFR framework.
